loginSubtitle: Log in to the matchmaking system securely and efficiently
onboardProfileSubtitle: Enter personal details, background, occupation, and education so every matchmaker sees a clear profile.
onboardPreferencesTitle: Define what they are looking for
onboardPreferencesSubtitle: Age, height, worldview, area, and more are saved as structured match preferences.
onboardMatchesSubtitle: The matches screen shows not only who fits, but why: age, height, worldview, and other details.
onboardCalendarSubtitle: After finding a match, schedule a meeting, save the place and time, and track the card status.
onboardRingTitle: The floating ring marks a closed match
onboardRingSubtitle: On an existing card, the floating ring opens quick marking as engaged or married, connects the partner, and moves the card to the right follow-up.
onboardRingPreviewNote: Tap the ring only when there is real progress in the match.
mainHeroSubtitle: Precise, respectful, and organized matchmaking management
registrationModeTitle: How many candidates would you like to register?
registrationModeDescription: You can finish after one candidate or continue directly with another registration.
candidateRegistrationSuccessMessage: The candidate details were saved successfully.
matchesBoardSubtitle: Suggested matches for the current card
matchReasonStayInArea: Wants to stay in the same area
invalidMeetingTime: Enter a time in HH:mm format
meetingAvailableMessage: The candidate is available. No meeting details are required.
archiveSubtitle: Cards marked as engaged or married are moved here automatically
archiveRestoreSuccess: The candidate was restored to all cards
archiveRestoreError: We could not restore the candidate. Please try again
archiveEmptyText: When a card is marked as engaged or married, it will appear here.
allMatchmakersCardsSubtitle: All active cards in the system
contactSubtitle: Send us comments, requests, or issues and the request will be saved in the system
contactSendError: We could not save the request
contactEmailNotSent: The request was saved, but the email was not sent. Check the server email settings
contactRequestsSubtitle: Track requests sent from the contact form
contactRequestsLoadError: We could not load the requests
contactRequestsEndpointMissing: The requests screen is not available on the server yet. Redeploy the backend
contactRequestUpdateError: We could not update the request
contactRequestMarkedRead: The request was marked as read
contactRequestMarkedHandled: The request was marked as handled
errorImageUpload: We could not upload the photos. Check the connection and try again
errorImageStorageNotConfigured: Photo storage is not configured on the server. Check Firebase Storage settings
errorProfileAccessDenied: You do not have permission to update this card
errorNoResponse: No response was received from the server
noInternetConnection: No internet connection. Check your connection and try again
invalidCredentials: The phone number or password is incorrect
candidateCodeSubtitle: Enter the verification code sent by SMS.
resendSms: Didn't get the code? Send again
candidateCodeResent: A new verification code was sent by SMS
candidateVoiceCall: Kosher phone? Get a voice call
candidateVoiceCodeSubtitle: A verification call will be made to the entered number. Enter the code read during the call.
candidateVoiceUnavailable: Voice verification is currently unavailable. Check the server Twilio configuration
candidateFallbackCodeSubtitle: Firebase SMS could not be sent. Enter the matchmaker phone number as the verification code.
candidateCodeExpired: The verification code expired. Send a new code
firebasePhoneAuthNotEnabled: Phone authentication is not enabled in Firebase
firebasePhoneAuthSetupError: Firebase phone authentication setup is missing for this app
firebasePhoneAuthQuotaExceeded: Too many verification attempts were sent. Try again later
firebasePhoneAuthServerPrecheckError: SMS verification could not start. Check that the matchmaker phone exists and the server is connected
firebasePhoneAuthUnknownError: Firebase phone authentication error. Check that Phone Authentication is enabled and rebuild the app
matchmakerNotFound: No matchmaker was found for that phone number
candidateAlreadyExists: A candidate who already exists in the system cannot be added
invalidRelationshipPartner: Select a partner of the opposite gender; the current profile cannot be selected
candidateCommitmentIntro: To continue entering your details, please confirm the following commitments:
candidateCommitmentTruth: I undertake to provide complete and accurate details and to tell the truth.
candidateCommitmentObservance: I observe Torah and mitzvot and maintain physical boundaries. Providing false information may result in removal from the app.
candidateCommitmentPayment: I understand that payment to the matchmaker will be made as agreed directly with them.
errorProfileCreateDenied: The current user is not allowed to add a candidate
registerUserSubtitle: Add a new matchmaker to the system securely and efficiently
usersSearchPlaceholder: Search by name, mobile, or email
deleteUserConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this user?
deleteCandidateConfirm: Permanently delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
candidateDeleteError: The candidate could not be deleted
exitEditWithoutSavingConfirm: Exit the editing process without saving?
noUploadedImages: No images have been uploaded yet
partnerSearchPlaceholder: Type a full name to select
noAssignedCards: No cards assigned to the logged-in user were found
meetingCalendarSubtitle: Meetings by day, time, and location
meetingCalendarEmptyText: Choose a meeting date, time, and location on the matches screen to display it here.

mediumSkin: Medium skin - neither dark nor light
colorfulWeekdayBlackWhiteShabbat: Colorful on weekdays and black-and-white on Shabbat
